product_overview: FINORA AI is a personal finance management web app that helps users track spending, plan budgets, set savings goals, and review their financial health in one place. It also includes an AI advisor for personalized financial guidance and exportable spending reports.
core_goals: Create an account and access a personalized finance workspace
Complete initial financial onboarding to configure a user profile
Track expenses and manage transaction records
Set and monitor budget limits by category
Define, edit, and progress toward savings goals
Review investment projections and future wealth estimates
Chat with an AI advisor for financial suggestions
Generate visual spending reports and export them as files
View and update user profile and settings

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign up or sign in with email and password to access the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit sign up form -> See account creation complete
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit sign in form -> See authenticated area
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Toggle password visibility -> Confirm the password entry is visible or hidden

features.name: Onboarding Setup
features.description: Lets new users set up their initial financial profile before using the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select financial goals -> Enter monthly income -> Select risk profile -> Complete profile setup -> See onboarding finish and proceed to the main app

features.name: Wealth Dashboard
features.description: Provides a financial overview with key metrics, budget status, net worth, and transaction summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View financial overview metrics -> Review active budgets and net worth -> Inspect recent transaction summaries
Navigate to /dashboard -> View dashboard content -> Move to another finance section from the main workspace

features.name: AI Advisor Chat
features.description: Provides an AI chat experience for personalized financial suggestions and guidance.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai-advisor -> Enter a financial question -> Send the message -> View the advisor response
Navigate to /ai-advisor -> Enter another question -> Send the message -> Review the conversation history and suggested guidance

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Enables users to add, review, and remove personal transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /expenses -> Enter transaction details including description, amount, category, and date -> Add the transaction -> See it appear in the transactions list
Navigate to /expenses -> Review the transactions list -> Remove a transaction -> See the transaction disappear from the list

features.name: Budget Planning
features.description: Lets users set category budget limits and monitor spending progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /budget -> Update budget limit values -> Save changes -> See updated budget progress bars
Navigate to /budget -> Review budget progression bars -> Compare spending against limits

features.name: Investments and Projection
features.description: Helps users estimate future wealth using SIP inputs, return rates, and duration settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /investments -> Enter monthly SIP contribution amount -> Adjust return rate and duration -> View projected future wealth total
Navigate to /investments -> Change projection settings -> Review the updated investment forecast

features.name: Goals Tracker
features.description: Allows users to create savings goals, update progress, and remove goals they no longer need.
user_flows: Navigate to /goals -> Enter goal title, target amount, current balance, and deadline -> Create the goal -> See the new goal in the tracker
Navigate to /goals -> Select a goal -> Update progress or edit details -> See the goal information change
Navigate to /goals -> Select a goal -> Delete the goal -> See the goal removed from the tracker

features.name: PDF Spending Reports
features.description: Shows expense and budget visualizations and supports exporting reports as PDF or PNG files.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> View expense and budget charts -> Review spending breakdowns and goal progress
Navigate to /reports -> View chart-based report -> Download the PDF report -> Save the exported file
Navigate to /reports -> View chart-based report -> Download the PNG report -> Save the exported image

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Lets users view and update their profile information and settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Review profile details -> Update personal settings -> Save changes -> See the updated profile information

routes.description: Visual spending reports and pdf export

user_interactions: Click Sign In or Sign Up button
